regulations.title: Italian Plastic Tax
regulations.summary: EUR 0.45/kg on MACSI; Parma Pasta ~380t/year MACSI creates EUR 171,000 estimated annual liability.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Glass reuse targets for olive oil bottles under consultation; 5% reuse by 2028 anticipated.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: Trivento holding exceeds all large-undertaking thresholds; DMA initiated with Deloitte Italy.
